installation.conclusion: The development runtime builds a linux/amd64 sidecar and installs it as /usr/local/bin/do-agent.

version.conclusion: The active dedicated Runner image reports do-agent 0.2.7.

license.conclusion: This integration has no verified publishable upstream license assertion; release or support promotion is blocked pending independent license verification.

protocol.conclusion: Do Agent exposes an ACP JSON-RPC 2.0 server over stdio and the Runner uses the exact do-agent-acp transport.

authentication.conclusion: The Definition accepts OpenAI-compatible or Anthropic model resources and injects only the corresponding provider environment reference.

configuration.conclusion: Do Agent exposes configuration management and receives a generated JSON settings document through the Definition-required settings binding.

persistence.conclusion: Do Agent exposes session resume under .agent/sessions and memory import/export operations; the Runner creates an isolated Do Agent home for each Worker.

platforms.conclusion: This verified development artifact is built and run as linux/amd64 in the dedicated Runner container.
